intent: An L-shaped aluminum bracket. Vertical face 50mm tall x 50mm long x 6mm thick. Horizontal face 50mm long x 30mm wide x 6mm thick. Two M6 clearance holes on the vertical face (centers at x=10,y=15 and x=40,y=15), two on the horizontal face (x=10,y=10 and x=40,y=10). Material 6061-T6, as-machined finish. One-off prototype.
context: Mounts a small motor to a chassis. Light load.
